articles.title: Trump slams Iranian reports on US-Iran agreement
articles.summary: Trump slams Iranian reports on US-Iran agreement US President Donald Trump slammed Iranian reports on ongoing negotations talks via a post on his Truth Social site, stating that "the terms that Iran leaked out to the Fake News have NOTHING to do with the terms that were agreed to, in writing." Iranian state media sources recently revealed the points agreed upon in the most recent US-Iran discussions.  He added that "what they said, including their weak and pathetic statement on having a deal, bears no relation to the truth."
